news.t: Morgan Stanley Investment Management Launches Eaton Vance Income Opportunities ETF

overview.description: The Eaton Vance Income Opportunities ETF (XAGG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF, aiming to provide diversified exposure to global fixed income securities. The funds primary objective is to pursue a high level of income, with a secondary objective of maximizing total return. XAGG was launched on Nov 10, 2025 and is issued by Eaton Vance.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Investment Management Launches Eaton Vance Income Opportunities ETF
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Morgan Stanley Investment Management (MSIM) announced today the successful conversion of the Morgan Stanley Income Opportunities Fund into the Eaton Vance Income Opportuniti...
